Video.summary: Emeril's in the kitchen to help you bring the best breakfast to the table. Plus, recipes: Kicked-Up Coffee, Fluffy Biscuits with Sausage Gravy, and more.
Video.title: Entertaining with Emeril

Video.summary: Emeril and food critic Ian McNulty make classic New Orleans cuisine.
Video.title: with Ian McNulty

Video.summary: Emeril hosts a group of "recipe rut" moms.
Video.title: Vinaigrettes Aren't Just for Salads

Video.summary: Tired of the same old chicken recipes? Emeril's prepares two exciting new chicken recipes: tagine of chicken with preserved lemons and olives and prosciutto- chicken roulade served with chard
Video.title: Chicken with a Twist

Video.summary: Emeril prepares coffee-infused recipes.
Video.title: Coffee: Sneaky Flavor Enhancer in Savory Dishes

Image.alt: Coffee: Sneaky Flavor Enhancer in Savory Dishes
Coffee: Sneaky Flavor Enhancer in Savory Dishes
Coffee: Sneaky Flavor Enhancer in Savory Dishes

Video.summary: For your next get together, punch up the menu with Emeril's coffee-inspired recipes!
Video.title: New Orleans Coffee

Video.summary: Emeril whips up Big Freedia's favorite southern meal.
Video.title: with Big Freedia

Video.summary: Treat guests to Emeril's collard greens recipes, inspired by Farmer Jones' fresh produce.
Video.title: Collard Greens For All

Video.summary: Emeril whips up diner favorites.
Video.title: Diner Classics

Video.summary: Any time of year is a great time for a cookout! Join Emeril for grilled rack of lamb with mixed-herb pesto and a side of grilled potatoes with feta
Video.title: Grill It Up!

Video.summary: Vichyssoise, Asparagus Crab Soup, Fruit Soup
Video.title: Spring Soups

Video.summary: Sauteed Flounder with Tomatoes and Olives, Baked Stuffed Flounder, Pan-Fried Flounder in Cornmeal with Smoked Oyster-Artichoke Relish
Video.title: Flounder

Video.summary: Emeril recreates some of his restaurant's best dishes with his son EJ Lagasse and Johnny Slamon.
Video.title: with Johnny Slamon and EJ Lagasse

Image.alt: with Johnny Slamon and EJ Lagasse
with Johnny Slamon and EJ Lagasse
with Johnny Slamon and EJ Lagasse

Video.summary: Emeril prepares oysters and mussels, including oysters on the half shell with three sauces. Plus, Emeril's classic Moules mariniere with pommes frites
Video.title: Bivalves: Oysters and Mussels

Video.summary: Emeril shares his burger favorites: buffalo burgers with bacon, cheese, and fresh thyme and Emeril's turkey burgers with cilantro mayonnaise
Video.title: Hamburger 101

Video.summary: Turkey Bolognese, Duck and Sausage Etouffee, Emeril's Chicken Pot Pies
Video.title: Home Cookin'

Video.summary: Pimento and Bacon Clams, Salt Cod and Lobster Cakes with Roasted Corn Relish and Classic Tartar Sauce, Blueberry Jam and Custard Pie
Video.title: New England Fare

Video.summary: Aloo Palak, Skordalia with Fried Calamari, Steak Frites, Shepherd's Pie
Video.title: World Famous Potatoes

Video.summary: Hot and Sour Cabbage, Cabbage Rolls, Fancified Sauerkraut
Video.title: Cabbage

Video.summary: Apple Nut Muffins with Streusel Topping, Bacon and Cheddar Scones, Tomato Herb Bread, Olive and Ricotta Spread Tea Sandwiches, Strawberry Shortcake
Video.title: Quick Breads

Video.summary: Homemade Buttermilk, Buttermilk Fried Chicken Salad with Buttermilk Parmesan Dressing, Alden's Grandmother's Cornbread, Buttermilk Praline Ice Cream
Video.title: Cooking with Buttermilk

Video.summary: Baby Greens with Fig Vinaigrette, Jumbo Lump Crab Meat Timbale in Clear Tomato Juice, Chicken en Papillote with Spicy Carrot Jus, Fruit Stew with Oatmeal Dumplings
Video.title: Less is More

Video.summary: Kicked-Up Clambake; Lobster and Sweet Corn Chowder; Clam Cakes with Tartar Sauce
Video.title: A Day at the Beach

Video.summary: Boiled Shrimp with Three Sauces; Shrimp Etouffee; Popcorn Shrimp; Shrimp Toast with Wasabi Sauce; Shrimp Scampi
Video.title: Shrimps

Video.summary: Shad Roe with Tomato-Anchovy Sauce, Smoked Sturgeon and Choupique Caviar Salad, Grilled Butterflied Rainbow Trout, Salmon with Crawfish and Fiddlehead Fern Ragout
Video.title: River Fish

Video.summary: Napoleon of Rutabaga Chips with Sauteed Shrimp; Potato Rosti with Duck Confit; Celery Root Bisque with Lobster; Salsify Saute with Crispy Black Bass
Video.title: Spring is in the Air

Video.summary: Smoked Salmon Tartare on Toast Points; Olive-Crusted Rack of Lamb with Summer Stuffed Tomatoes; Grand Marnier Creme Brulee with Chocolate Ginger Shards
Video.title: Ladies' Night

Video.summary: Creole Oyster Stew; Etouffee; Chicken, Ham and Smoked Sausage Gumbo; Creole Seafood Court-Bouillon
Video.title: Creole Soups and Stews

Video.summary: Bratwurst with Smothered Cabbage, Flo's Roasted Potato Salad, Roasted Pork and Tasso Jambalaya, Beer-Battered Fried Okra Stuffed with Crab Meat, Funnel Cakes
Video.title: State Fairs

Video.summary: Dilled Peas and Walnuts, Fresh Pea Relish with Tuna, Pasta with Peas and Bacon
Video.title: Peas

Video.summary: Bibb Lettuce Salad, Little Soup from the 17th Century, Braised Baby Romaine
Video.title: Lettuce

Video.summary: King Cake, New Orleans' Best Pain Francais, Panzanella-French Bread Salad
Video.title: Yeast Breads
